debug_info.goal:
case hba
R : Type u_1
A : Type u_2
C : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : CommSemiring R
inst✝⁴ : CommSemiring A
inst✝³ : CommSemiring C
inst✝² : HopfAlgebra R A
inst✝¹ : HopfAlgebra R C
inst✝ : IsCocomm R C
⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

failed_attempts:
ext x
      simp only [LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.mul_apply', convMul_def, LinearMap.mul'_apply]
      rw [← LinearMap.comp_apply (f := comul) (g := comul)]
      simp only [coassoc, LinearMap.comp_apply]
      conv_lhs => rw [← LinearMap.comp_apply (f := _ ⊗ₘ _), ← LinearMap.comp_apply (f := comul)]
      rw [← IsCocomm.isCocomm (R := R) (A := C)]
      simp [LinearMap.rTensor_comp_lTensor, ← LinearMap.comp_assoc,
        sum_antipode_mul_eq_algebraMap_counit, Coalgebra.counit_comul]

simp only [HopfAlgebra.toLinearMap_antipodeAlgHom]
      rw [← cocomm (R := R) (A := C)]
      exact LinearMap.comul_right_inv

ext c
      simp only [comp_apply, id_apply, convMul_apply]
      rw [← sum_mul_antipode_eq_algebraMap_counit (ℛ R c)]
      simp only [Coalgebra.Repr.sum_comul_repr, map_sum, HopfAlgebra.toLinearMap_antipodeAlgHom]
      congr 1
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
      intro i _
      simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.map_tmul, AlgHom.coe_id, id_eq, comulAlgHom_apply]
      rw [IsCocomm.cocomm_repr, Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_comm]

calc comul ∘ₗ LinearMap.mul' R C ∘ₗ (antipode R ⊗ₘ .id) ∘ₗ comul
        _ = comul ∘ₗ (antipode R * .id) := rfl
        _ = comul ∘ₗ Algebra.linearMap R C ∘ₗ counit := by simp [LinearMap.convOne_def]
        _ = (Algebra.linearMap R (C ⊗[R] C) ∘ₗ counit) := by
            ext; simp
    · calc comul ∘ₗ LinearMap.mul' R C ∘ₗ (.id ⊗ₘ antipode R) ∘ₗ comul
        _ = comul ∘ₗ (.id * antipode R) := rfl
        _ = comul ∘ₗ Algebra.linearMap R C ∘ₗ counit := by simp [LinearMap.convOne_def]
        _ = (Algebra.linearMap R (C ⊗[R] C) ∘ₗ counit) := by
            ext; simp

ext c
      simp only [LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.mul'_apply, map_sum, map_tmul,
        HopfAlgebra.toLinearMap_antipodeAlgHom]
      rw [← sum_antipode_mul_eq_algebraMap_counit (ℛ R c)]
      simp only [Repr.eq_sum, map_sum, map_tmul, LinearMap.mul'_apply]
    · ext c
      simp only [LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.mul'_apply, map_sum, map_tmul,
        HopfAlgebra.toLinearMap_antipodeAlgHom, IsCocomm.comul_comm]
      rw [← sum_mul_antipode_eq_algebraMap_counit (ℛ R c)]
      simp only [Repr.eq_sum, map_sum, map_tmul, LinearMap.mul'_apply]

simp only [HopfAlgebra.toLinearMap_antipodeAlgHom]
      rw [IsCocomm.comul_comm (R := R) (A := C)]
      exact LinearMap.comul_right_inv

simp only [LinearMap.convMul_def, ← LinearMap.comp_assoc]
      conv_lhs => rw [← LinearMap.id_comp comul, ← LinearMap.antipode_mul_id (R := R) (C := C)]
      simp only [LinearMap.convMul_def, LinearMap.comp_assoc]
      congr 1
      ext x
      simp [Repr.comul_apply, map_sum, IsCocomm.comul_comm (R := R)]

simp only [LinearMap.convMul_def, LinearMap.comp_assoc, ← LinearMap.rTensor_def]
      ext; simp [sum_antipode_mul_eq_algebraMap_counit, LinearMap.convOne_def]

simp only [LinearMap.mul'_comp, LinearMap.comp_assoc]
      rw [show comul (R := R) (A := C) ∘ₗ LinearMap.mul' R C = LinearMap.mul' R (C ⊗[R] C) ∘ₗ (comul ⊗ₘ comul) from by ext; simp]
      simp [LinearMap.convOne_def, ← LinearMap.comp_assoc]
